title: Monday Forms add feature to allow responder to select "send me a copy of my responses"
excerpt: I have a form (and will have more!) with many subitems, and many have their own subitems, etc. There are too many variables to make an automation feasible for my form. Is there any way to have an automated email sent tha…

posts.author: klindsey (Kristy)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a form (and will have more!) with many subitems, and many have their own subitems, etc. There are too many variables to make an automation feasible for my form. Is there any way to have an automated email sent that just lists a responders choices?

posts.author: klindsey (Kristy)
posts.cookedHtml: image726×236 10.3 KB

posts.author: Hpettis (Heather Pettis)
posts.cookedHtml: This option isn’t available (at least I don’t see it) via the Workform in Monday. And I haven’t been able to figure out an automation that sends a copy of a submission to the sender. Am I miss something? Thanks! This has been a frustrating endeavor to figure out.

posts.author: KathleenF (Kathleen Fergus)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I agree this is a requirement for our business too

posts.author: Ingperazaromero (Hector)
posts.cookedHtml: any update? It will be really helpful for clients

posts.author: lindztaylor (Lindsay)
posts.cookedHtml: I just submitted a very similar request (this topic didn’t pop up until after I hit submit ), but this is so important that the person who submitted the form gets an exact copy of their form to avoid issues, especially when dealing with legal ramifications. Jotforms and Google Forms both have it automatically going.

posts.author: CrystalM (Crystal  Miller)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed this is critical, Smartsheet also has this functionality

posts.author: Penfold (John)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just managed this using the “When item is created” automation and integrating with my gmail.

image649×186 8.83 KB
